params.name: Webb Space Telescope
params.description:
On Apr 15, 2021 AD, the Webb Space Telescope successfully operated in space for three days.
The Webb Space Telescope, from its construction to completion, gathered thousands of scientists, technicians, and engineers from around the world, spending 40 million hours and 10 billion US dollars. The entire telescope is composed of eighteen huge sub-mirrors. The area that collects light is six times larger than that of the Hubble Space Telescope. In addition, it is equipped with various instruments …
